message:
feat(pipelines): add Pipeline Engine frontend UI

Add complete frontend implementation for pipeline orchestration:
- usePipelines.ts: Comprehensive hooks for pipeline API integration
  - Query hooks: usePipelines, usePipeline, usePipelineRuns, usePipelineRun
  - Mutation hooks: useCreatePipeline, useUpdatePipeline, useDeletePipeline
  - Control hooks: useRunPipeline, usePausePipeline, useResumePipeline, useCancelPipeline
  - useTogglePipeline, useApproveStep
  - Mock data for development mode
  - Full type definitions matching backend models

- Pipelines.tsx: Pipeline management dashboard page
  - Pipeline list with expandable cards showing stats
  - Trigger type icons (manual, schedule, webhook, bead_event)
  - Success rate badges with color coding
  - Step visualization with status pills
  - Run history table with action controls
  - Filter by enabled/disabled state

- Router integration: /pipelines route
- Sidebar integration: Pipelines nav item with Workflow icon

Closes flywheel_gateway-6ld

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
